Class AsyncTransactWriteBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.async.AsyncTransactWriteBuilder
public class AsyncTransactWriteBuilder extends Object
Builds an async transactional write operation that groups up to 100 put, update, delete, and condition check actions atomically across one or more tables.

Obtain via AsyncDynamoSimplifiedClient.transactWrite(). All actions succeed or none are applied. If any condition fails or a conflict occurs, the entire transaction is rejected.

    Constructs a new AsyncTransactWriteBuilder.

      Constructs a new AsyncTransactWriteBuilder.
      Parameters:
      enhancedClient - the enhanced async DynamoDB client
      dynamoDbAsyncClient - the low-level async DynamoDB client

  • Method Details

    • put

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncTransactWriteBuilder put(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull T item)
      Adds a put action to insert or replace an item.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to write to
      item - the item to put
      Returns:
      this builder

    • update

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncTransactWriteBuilder update(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull T item)
      Adds an update action to modify an existing item.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to update
      item - the item with updated values
      Returns:
      this builder

    • update

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncTransactWriteBuilder update(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull T item, @NonNull Consumer<UpdateExpression> expressionConfigurator)
      Adds an update action with a partial update expression for fine-grained attribute modifications.

      Use the expressionConfigurator to specify SET, REMOVE, ADD, and/or DELETE clauses. When an expression-based update is included in the transaction, the entire transaction is sent via the low-level DynamoDB API rather than the enhanced client.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to update
      item - the item providing the key identifying the item to update
      expressionConfigurator - a consumer to build the update expression
      Returns:
      this builder

    • delete

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncTransactWriteBuilder delete(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey)
      Adds a delete action by partition key.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to delete from
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • delete

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncTransactWriteBuilder delete(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @NonNull Object sortKey)
      Adds a delete action by partition and sort key.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to delete from
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      sortKey - the sort key value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • conditionCheck

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncTransactWriteBuilder conditionCheck(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @NonNull Consumer<ConditionExpression.Builder> condition)
      Adds a condition check action that verifies a condition on an item without modifying it.

      If the condition is not satisfied, the entire transaction is rejected.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to check
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      condition - a consumer to build the condition expression (e.g. expr -> expr.eq("status", "active"))
      Returns:
      this builder

    • conditionCheck

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncTransactWriteBuilder conditionCheck(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @Nullable Object sortKey, @NonNull Consumer<ConditionExpression.Builder> condition)
      Adds a condition check action with sort key.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to check
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      sortKey - the sort key value
      condition - a consumer to build the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder

    • execute

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> execute()
      Executes the transactional write operation asynchronously.

      All actions are applied atomically. If any action fails, a TransactionCanceledException is thrown.

      If any operation in the transaction uses an UpdateExpression, the entire transaction is sent via the low-level DynamoDB API. Otherwise, the enhanced DynamoDB client is used.

      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture that completes when the transaction has been applied
